title: Definitive Interpretability Analysis: Spectral CoI Arity Reduction vs. Random Oblique
summary: Demo notebook for a comprehensive 6-part interpretability evaluation of signed spectral FIGS vs. random oblique FIGS. Loads 60 aggregated results (5 datasets x 3 methods x 4 max_splits) and runs: (A) arity comparison table, (B) Pareto frontier analysis, (C) Wilcoxon signed-rank test with bootstrap CIs, (D) path length comparison, (E) interpretability cost metrics, and (F) practical cognitive complexity interpretation. Includes 3-panel matplotlib visualization of arity, cognitive complexity, and Pareto dominance. Data sourced from mini_demo_data.json with GitHub URL + local fallback pattern.
